---
name: Integration profile request
about: Propose or review an AFT integration profile
title: "[Integration]: "
labels: "integration, proposal"
assignees: ""
---

## Protocol Or Ecosystem

Name the protocol, payment rail, identity system, wallet system, marketplace, or ecosystem.

## What AFT Consumes

List credentials, receipts, mandates, signatures, events, policy decisions, or settlement references AFT would consume.

## What AFT Emits

List AFT events, credentials, reputation snapshots, anchors, or risk outputs.

## Proposed Event Mappings

Map ecosystem actions to AFT event types.

## Identity Assumptions

Describe agent, principal, operator, merchant, wallet, DID, credential, or account assumptions.

## Payment Assumptions

Describe settlement, authorization, refund, reversal, chargeback, escrow, or credit assumptions.

## Privacy Considerations

Describe data minimization, selective disclosure, and on-chain commitment constraints.

## Security Considerations

Describe replay, impersonation, key compromise, false reporting, fraud, and dispute risks.

## Compatibility Notes

Describe backwards compatibility and non-competition with existing protocols.

## Open Questions

List unresolved issues.
